title: notebook-auto-clear output data
description:
Honest accounting of one auto-clear pass.

``cleared`` names the sections a NEW record was appended for; ``skipped``
names every other source section with its reason. An idempotent re-run at
unchanged hashes clears nothing and skips everything ``already-current``.

cleared.description: Sections a fresh CODE auto-clear was journaled for, in source order.
cleared.title: Cleared

skipped.description: Sections NOT cleared, in source order — human_required (never clearable by code) or already-current (idempotent no-op).
skipped.title: Skipped

NotebookAutoClearSkipped.description:
One section that was NOT auto-cleared, with the honest reason.

``reason`` is either a D-attention tier (``human_required`` — a modified /
lint-flagged / ungreen-assertion section the code may never clear) or
``already-current`` (the section is already cleared-current in the journal —
an auto-clear or a human sign-off at this hash — so a re-run appends nothing).
NotebookAutoClearSkipped.title: notebook-auto-clear skipped section

NotebookAutoClearedSection.description: One section a CODE auto-clear record was appended for this call.
NotebookAutoClearedSection.title: notebook-auto-clear cleared section
